title: OrderOfIssueTypes
description: An ordered list of issue type IDs and information about where to move them.

after.description: The ID of the issue type to place the moved issue types after. Required if `position` isn't provided.

issueTypeIds.description: A list of the issue type IDs to move. The order of the issue type IDs in the list is the order they are given after the move.

position.description: The position the issue types should be moved to. Required if `after` isn't provided.
